description: Strumenti di rete avanzati: IP, Ping, Stato Proxy, Mappatura LAN e VPN/DNS.

commands.get_network_info: Runs ipconfig to extract local IPv4, Subnet, Default Gateway, and active DNS servers.
commands.get_proxy_status: Reports the current proxy configuration status in Hecos, including the URL and whether it is active.
commands.get_public_ip: Interrogates an external service to find the current public outbound IP address.
commands.ping_test: Executes a network ping test to the specified target (IP or domain).
commands.reset_dns: Restores the DNS configuration of the active network adapter back to DHCP (automatic).
commands.scan_local_network: Executes an ARP scan ('arp -a') to discover active devices connected to the same LAN.
commands.set_dns_servers: Changes the DNS servers of the active network adapter to bypass ISP level blocking.
commands.traceroute: Performs a traceroute to show the network path and hop-by-hop latency to a host.
commands.check_internet_speed: Tests download/upload internet speed using speedtest-cli or a CDN fallback.
commands.test_proxy: Tests the configured Proxy by attempting to reach an external service and reports the visible IP.

function.name: SYS_NET__get_network_info
function.description: Runs ipconfig to extract local IPv4, Subnet, Default Gateway, and active DNS servers.

function.name: SYS_NET__get_proxy_status
function.description: Reports the current proxy configuration status in Hecos, including the URL and whether it is active.

function.name: SYS_NET__get_public_ip
function.description: Interrogates an external service to find the current public outbound IP address.

function.name: SYS_NET__ping_test
function.description: Executes a network ping test to the specified target (IP or domain).

target.description: The domain name (e.g., 'google.com') or IP address to ping.

function.name: SYS_NET__reset_dns
function.description: Restores the DNS configuration of the active network adapter back to DHCP (automatic).

function.name: SYS_NET__scan_local_network
function.description: Executes an ARP scan ('arp -a') to discover active devices connected to the same LAN.

function.name: SYS_NET__set_dns_servers
function.description: Changes the DNS servers of the active network adapter to bypass ISP level blocking.

function.name: SYS_NET__test_proxy
function.description: Tests the configured Proxy by attempting to reach an external service and reports the visible IP.

function.name: SYS_NET__traceroute
function.description: Performs a traceroute to show the network path and hop-by-hop latency to a host. Useful for diagnosing routing issues or high-latency connections.

function.name: SYS_NET__check_internet_speed
function.description: Tests the current internet download and upload speed. Uses speedtest-cli if installed, otherwise falls back to a timed Cloudflare CDN download.
